category_sources: Official repository README describes ghq as cloning and organizing remote repositories.
source_facts.description says remote repository management made easy.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses ghq.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for install, commands, and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/x-motemen/ghq; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README examples show cloning and managing repositories under ghq.
